html_content:
Welcome {{first_name}}

Glad to have you in the Off-Mic community.
name: offmic-welcome
subject: Welcome to Off-Mic, {{first_name}}!

html_content: Click here to reset your Off-Mic account password.
name: password-reset
subject: Reset your Off-Mic password

html_content: Thank you for your supporter shop order. Total paid: R{{amount}}.
name: shop-receipt
subject: Your Off-Mic supporter shop receipt {{order_id}}

html_content: You are on the list for the Off-Mic launch. We go live in {{days}} days.
name: launch-reminder
subject: Off-Mic launches in {{days}} days

html_content: Your RSVP for the Off-Mic live taping on {{event_date}} is confirmed.
name: rsvp-confirmation
subject: Your Off-Mic live RSVP is confirmed

html_content: Thank you for nominating {{nominee}} for Voices of the City.
name: voices-nomination-confirm
subject: We received your Voices of the City nomination

name: shop-shipped
subject: Your Off-Mic order is on its way

html_content: Thank you for becoming a founding supporter of Off-Mic, {{first_name}}.
name: founding-thank-you
subject: Thank you for backing Off-Mic

html_content: We would love your feedback on the Off-Mic pilots. Share it here.
name: pilot-feedback
subject: Tell us what you thought of Off-Mic

html_content: {{item}} is back in stock in the Off-Mic supporter shop.
name: shop-restock
subject: Back in stock at the Off-Mic shop

html_content: Join us at the Off-Mic Joburg listener meetup on {{event_date}}.
name: joburg-meetup
subject: You are invited to the Off-Mic Joburg meetup

html_content: Thanks for suggesting {{guest_name}} as an Off-Mic guest.
name: guest-suggestion-confirm
subject: Thanks for your Off-Mic guest suggestion
